nodes.name: Turdus
nodes.summary: Turdus（Turdus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联91种鸟类，如梅林 (亞瑟王傳說)、Ethiopian thrush、非洲地鸫等91种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界

nodes.name: Usambara thrush
nodes.summary: The Usambara thrush (Turdus roehli), also known as Roehl's thrush or Usambara olive thrush, is a species of thrush found in eastern Africa. Formerly, it was considered as a subspecies of the olive thrush, with which it is known to hybridize with, but is now recognised as a separate species. Description This medium-sized bird has a length of about 24 cm. It has a wing length between 117 and 131 mm, a culmen length between 20 and 24 mm and a tarsus length between 30,0 and 34,5 mm. It can reach a mass of at least 86 g. It occurs in the Pare and Usambara mountains of north-central Tanzania. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Usambara thrush (Turdus roehli), also known as Roehl's thrush or Usambara olive thrush, is a species of thrush found in eastern Africa.…
